backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Nellore Print Hub backend, defining all core data types (quotations, projects, reviews, admin users, etc.) and mixing in blob storage and authorization modules.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three implemented features (design-ready toggle fix, admin auth/routing fix, admin login link) to their affected files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, used as build planning reference for the project's frontend modules.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, sidebar, charts, etc.).
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Vite/React app, setting the page title to 'Nellore Print Hub' and mounting the React root at `#root`.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all public, admin, and customer routes, and wraps the app with ThemeProvider, QueryClientProvider, LanguageProvider, and CustomerAuthProvider.
frontend/src/components/AdminGuard.tsx: Route guard component that synchronously checks for a valid email/password session in sessionStorage and falls back to Internet Identity verification, redirecting unauthenticated users to login or setup pages.
frontend/src/components/BilingualText.ts: Presentational component that renders English and Telugu text together, either stacked vertically or inline with a separator.
frontend/src/components/BottomNav.tsx: Mobile bottom navigation bar with tabs for Home, Services, Gallery, Testimonials, Contact, and Chat, highlighting the active route with an indicator.
frontend/src/components/BottomSheet.tsx: A modal bottom sheet component that slides up from the bottom of the screen, locks body scroll when open, and supports an optional title with a close button.
frontend/src/components/BottomSheetSelec: A form select component that opens a BottomSheet with a list of options, showing a checkmark on the selected item and triggering haptic feedback on selection.
frontend/src/components/ChatWidget.tsx: A floating chat widget that allows authenticated users to send and view messages, displaying a login prompt for unauthenticated users and sorting messages chronologically.
frontend/src/components/CustomerGuard.ts: A route guard component that redirects unauthenticated customers to the login page and renders children only when authenticated.
frontend/src/components/LanguageToggle.t: A toggle button that switches the app language between English and Telugu with haptic feedback.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The main app layout providing a sticky header with navigation, a mobile menu, a footer with contact info, and a scroll-to-top button, wrapping page content.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: A button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, showing a loading spinner during authentication and clearing the query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/NegotiationHisto: Displays a scrollable chat-style history of negotiation messages between a customer and admin, with distinct styling for each sender.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: A modal dialog form for new users to set up their profile by entering name, email, and mobile number, with validation and haptic feedback on submission.
frontend/src/components/ProjectDetailMod: A modal dialog component that displays detailed information about a selected project, including its image, title, category badge, description, and completion date, with bilingual (English/Telugu) support.
frontend/src/components/PullToRefreshCon: A wrapper component that adds pull-to-refresh functionality to its children using touch events, showing a spinner indicator during pulling and refreshing states.
frontend/src/components/ShareAppButton.t: A button component that triggers the native Web Share API or falls back to clipboard copy to share the app's URL and description.
frontend/src/components/SkeletonCard.tsx: A loading skeleton placeholder component that renders animated shimmer cards in four variants: project, review, quotation, and a default service layout.
frontend/src/components/SwipeContainer.t: A wrapper component that enables horizontal swipe-based navigation by applying a translateX transform based on touch gesture offset.
frontend/src/contexts/CustomerAuthContex: A React context that manages customer authentication sessions, persisting the session to localStorage and exposing login/logout methods.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: A React context that manages the active UI language (English or Telugu), persists the selection to localStorage, and provides a translation lookup function.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdmin.ts: A hook that queries the backend to determine whether the currently authenticated Internet Identity caller has admin privileges.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminAuth.ts: A hook that exposes a mutation for verifying admin credentials by hashing the password with SHA-256 and calling the backend's verifyAuthentication method.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminContent.ts: Hooks for fetching and updating the admin-managed site content (contact info, services, hours, gallery, etc.) via React Query mutations and queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminExists.ts: A hook that checks whether any admin users exist in the backend by querying the admin user count.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminInvitations.t: Hooks for listing existing admin invitations and creating new ones by hashing the password and calling the backend's inviteAdminUser method.
Hooks for registering the first admin via Internet Identity principal and for seeding the first admin's email/password credentials when no admin exists yet.
frontend/src/hooks/useAppName.ts: Provides React Query hooks to get and set the application name via the backend actor, with a 5-minute stale time and cache invalidation on update.
frontend/src/hooks/useBiometricAuth.ts: Provides mutations for biometric login and registration using WebAuthn, verifying device support and registering credentials with the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useChat.ts: Provides React Query hooks for sending messages, fetching all chat messages, owner replies, and retrieving chat history for specific customers.
frontend/src/hooks/useCompanyLogo.ts: Provides hooks to fetch and update the company logo stored as an ExternalBlob via the backend actor, with cache invalidation on update.
frontend/src/hooks/useContactInfo.ts: Provides hooks to get and update contact information (email, phone, address, maps link) via the backend actor with a 5-minute stale time.
frontend/src/hooks/useCustomerQuotations: Provides a query hook to fetch all quotation requests for a specific customer by their ID from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useDelivery.ts: Provides hooks to fetch delivery configuration, calculate delivery fees by distance, and update delivery config (per-km rate and minimum fee) via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login, logout, and identity state to React components.
frontend/src/hooks/useNegotiation.ts: Provides a mutation hook to submit owner responses to quotation negotiations, invalidating quotation caches on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useOfficeLocation.ts: Provides hooks to get and set the office location via the backend actor, with cache invalidation on update.
frontend/src/hooks/useProjects.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on projects, including fetching all projects, filtering by category, and adding, editing, or deleting projects.
frontend/src/hooks/usePullToRefresh.ts: Implements a pull-to-refresh gesture hook using touch events, tracking pull distance and triggering a refresh callback when a configurable threshold is exceeded.
frontend/src/hooks/useQuotationFile.ts: Provides a query hook to fetch the reply file blob associated with a specific quotation ID via the backend actor.
Provides a mutation hook to handle quotation responses (status updates and optional messages) via the backend actor, invalidating quotation caches on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useQuotations.ts: Provides React Query hooks for quotation CRUD operations including fetching all/my quotations, getting details, creating, adding details, approving, and managing customer-pending status via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useQuotationStatistic: Provides a query hook to fetch quotation counts grouped by status from the backend actor, refreshing every 30 seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useReviews.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch all reviews, filter reviews by rating, and add a new review through the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useServiceImages.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch, add, and delete service images via the backend actor, invalidating the serviceImages cache on mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useSwipeNavigation.ts: Custom hook that tracks touch events to enable horizontal swipe-based navigation between a predefined set of page routes using TanStack Router.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserProfile.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch the current caller's user profile and save/update it via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useVideoClips.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch, add, and delete video clips via the backend actor, invalidating the videoClips cache on mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a comprehensive set of CSS custom properties for a deep teal and gold printing theme with both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/lib/blobStorage.ts: Wraps the backend ExternalBlob class to provide a typed frontend interface for creating blobs from URLs or bytes, retrieving bytes or direct URLs, and tracking upload progress.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with TanStack Query, InternetIdentity authentication, and global CSS providers.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Renders the About page with a hero banner, a grid of company benefit cards, and a commitment section, using i18n translations from LanguageContext.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AboutContentMan: Admin page protected by AdminGuard that loads and saves the About page custom text content via the admin content hooks, presenting a textarea and save button.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminDashboardP: Main admin dashboard displaying quotation status statistics in stat cards and a grid of navigation links to all admin management sections, with a logout button.
Admin login page supporting three authentication methods: email/password, biometric, and Internet Identity. Stores session data in sessionStorage and navigates to the admin dashboard on successful login.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminRegistrati: Admin registration page with a form for creating a new admin account via email and password. Validates inputs and calls the invite admin mutation, then redirects to the login page on success.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminUserManage: Admin user management page that lists existing admin users and provides a dialog form to invite new admin users with email and password. Protected by AdminGuard and uses admin invitation hooks.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AppNameManageme: Admin page for viewing and updating the application name displayed site-wide. Fetches the current name, validates input, and saves changes via the useSetAppName hook.
frontend/src/pages/admin/BusinessHoursMa: Admin page for managing business hours for each day of the week, supporting open/close times and a closed toggle. Loads existing hours from admin content and saves updates via the useUpdateAdminContent hook.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ChatManagementP: Admin page for viewing and responding to customer chat messages, grouping them by customer email with expandable conversation threads and reply functionality.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ContactInfoMana: Admin page for editing and saving business contact details (email, phone, address, maps link) using admin content hooks with bilingual (English/Telugu) UI.
frontend/src/pages/admin/DeliveryConfigM: Admin page for configuring delivery pricing, allowing admins to set per-km rate and minimum fee (stored in paise, displayed in rupees) with bilingual labels.
frontend/src/pages/admin/HomepageContent: Admin page for editing and saving the homepage promotional/announcement text content via a textarea with bilingual (English/Telugu) labels.
frontend/src/pages/admin/LogoManagementP: Admin page for uploading and previewing the company logo, supporting file validation, upload progress tracking, and displaying the current logo.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ProjectManageme: Admin page for managing portfolio projects with full CRUD operations, supporting image uploads, category selection, and an add/edit dialog form.
frontend/src/pages/admin/QuotationManage: Admin page for viewing and managing all customer quotations, with expandable cards showing quotation details, status badges, and actions to mark as customer-pending or accept payment.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ServiceMediaMan: Admin page for managing service images and video clips, with tabs to add/delete media items by service type using URL inputs.
frontend/src/pages/ContactUsPage.tsx: Renders the Contact Us page with company contact info cards (phone, email, address) and a message submission form that calls the backend actor's sendMessage method.
frontend/src/pages/customer/CustomerLogi: Customer login page that authenticates users via email/mobile and SHA-256-hashed password against the backend actor, then redirects to the customer portal.
frontend/src/pages/customer/CustomerPort: Customer portal dashboard displaying the logged-in customer's quotations with status badges, progress indicators, and a logout button.
frontend/src/pages/customer/CustomerRegi: Customer registration page that collects email, mobile, and password, hashes the password with SHA-256, and calls the backend actor to create a new account before redirecting to login.
frontend/src/pages/DeliveryInfoPage.tsx: Displays delivery pricing information (per-km rate and minimum fee) fetched from the backend, and provides an interactive calculator where users can input a distance to estimate their delivery fee.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: The main landing page showcasing the print shop's services, sample prints, features, and a hero section with the dynamic app name, supporting bilingual content via the language context.
frontend/src/pages/MyQuotationsPage.tsx: Lists the current user's quotation requests with status badges and expandable detail sections showing price, description, terms, and downloadable reply files, with support for customer approval actions.
frontend/src/pages/ProjectGalleryPage.ts: Displays a filterable masonry-style gallery of completed projects, allowing users to filter by service category and open a detail modal for any selected project.
frontend/src/pages/QuotationConfirmation: A post-submission confirmation page that shows the new quotation ID and a numbered list of next steps, with navigation buttons to view quotations or return home.
A form page for submitting a new print quotation request, collecting service type, deadline, project details, contact info, and design status, then navigating to the confirmation page on success.
frontend/src/pages/QuotationResponsePage: Displays a customer-facing page listing their quotation requests with cards that support accepting, rejecting, negotiating, and approving prices, fetching per-quotation details and showing negotiation history via dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/ServicesPage.tsx: Renders a static services catalog page listing six print service categories (design, digital, outdoor, indoor, screen, offset) with images, descriptions, and navigation to a quotation request flow.
frontend/src/pages/SubmitReviewPage.tsx: Provides a form page for authenticated customers to submit a star-rated review with name, text, project type, and optional image upload, then navigates to the testimonials page on success.
frontend/src/pages/TestimonialsPage.tsx: Shows a filterable grid of customer reviews fetched from the backend, with rating filter chips, pull-to-refresh, skeleton loading states, and a button to navigate to the review submission page.
frontend/src/translations/en.ts: Defines the full English translation dictionary for the Nellore Print Hub app, covering UI labels for navigation, services, quotation forms, statuses, customer portal, and more.
frontend/src/translations/index.ts: Re-exports English and Telugu translation objects and provides a `getTranslations` helper that returns the correct dictionary based on the selected language.
frontend/src/translations/te.ts: Defines the full Telugu translation dictionary mirroring the English keys, providing localized strings for all app UI sections.
frontend/src/utils/haptics.ts: Provides haptic feedback utilities using the browser Vibration API, with named patterns for tap, success, error, and selection interactions.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/src/utils/webauthn.ts: Provides WebAuthn helper functions for checking platform authenticator support, registering and authenticating credentials, and converting between ArrayBuffer and Base64.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom CSS-variable-based colors (teal, gold, ink, paper), brand fonts, border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state including known issues (design-ready toggle not responding, admin login routing failure in production) and existing feature fix requests with their requirement IDs.
